name: Loadero
description: Loadero — Cloud-based automated performance and load testing platform for WebRTC, web, and API applications.

seo.title: Loadero — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Loadero: Loadero — Cloud-based automated performance and load testing platform for WebRTC, web, and API applications.

when_to_use: WebRTC performance and load testing in the cloud
Browser-based user simulation for media-heavy apps
Concurrent participant load testing for video calls
API load testing with configurable ramp and hold phases

pros: WebRTC load testing is a real differentiator
Good for video, audio and conferencing apps
cons: Overkill for simple HTTP-only load tests
review.verdict: One of the few credible options for WebRTC load testing, priced like a specialty product.
review.best_for: Teams building video, voice or real-time conferencing apps
review.not_for: Standard web or API load tests where k6 is simpler and cheaper
